projectDescription: A standalone C library that mimics Minecraft Java Edition biome and structure generation for fast seed-finding and map visualization.
keyFeatures: Fast Minecraft biome generation for all versions from Beta 1.7 to 1.21
Multi-dimensional support: Overworld, Nether, and End
Structure position finding for 25+ structure types
Quad-structure seed searching with multi-threaded 48-bit seed enumeration
Biome filtering with configurable required and excluded biomes
Noise-based generation for 1.18+ (climate parameters: temperature, humidity, continentalness, erosion, weirdness)
Layered generation for versions up to 1.17
Spawn point and stronghold location finding
Utility functions for biome colormaps and PPM image export
C and C++ compatible header-only RNG and inline functions
publicApiSurface: getBiomeAt(const Generator *g, int scale, int x, int y, int z)
getStructurePos(int structureType, int mc, uint64_t seed, int regX, int regZ, Pos *pos)
isViableStructurePos(int structType, Generator *g, int blockX, int blockZ, uint32_t flags)
searchAll48(uint64_t **seedbuf, uint64_t *buflen, const char *path, int threads, ...)
isQuadBase(const StructureConfig sconf, uint64_t seed, int radius)
checkForBiomes(Generator *g, int *cache, Range r, int dim, uint64_t seed, ...)
moveStructure(uint64_t baseSeed, int regX, int regZ)
getVariant(StructureVariant *sv, int structType, int mc, uint64_t seed, int blockX, int blockZ, int biomeID)
savePPM(const char* path, const unsigned char *pixels, unsigned int sx, unsigned int sy)
